## 💻 Environment

Please provide details about your environment:
- **Operating System / Version**: [e.g. macOS Sonoma, Windows 11]
- **Browser & Version** (if frontend/UI issue): [e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. v22.1.0]
- **MQTT Radar version or Git commit SHA**: [e.g. v0.1.0 or `main` branch HEAD]
- **MQTT Broker Info** (if connector/connection issue): [e.g. EMQX v5.7, local Mosquitto over TCP]
